title: User Guide
description: The end-to-end user guide: how to run the platform, page by page.

steps.title: The guide
steps.description: How every module works, in one place.
steps.voiceScript: This user guide explains how every module of the platform works.
steps.captionText: This user guide explains how every module of the platform works.

steps.title: Read it aloud

steps.title: Every page also teaches itself
steps.description: Help & Tutorial runs on each page.
steps.voiceScript: And on any page, Help and Tutorial runs a guided tour of that screen.
